name: Magical Frontline
short_description: The Fantasy Card Game is available in version 2.0 with 3 New Game Modes, more advanced enemies, cards and more. The Magic Battles for the supremacy in the territory, Local Multiplayer, Tower of Mytikas and Conquest in Ziliana Gorge. Zeus awaits in the Top, the glory awaits for you. Play Now.
detailed_description:
The Fantasy Card Game is available in version 2.0 with 3 New Game Modes, more advanced enemies, cards and more. The Magic Battles for the supremacy in the territory, 2 players in Local Multi, Tower of Mytikas and Conquest in Ziliana Gorge. Zeus awaits in the Top, the glory awaits for you. Play now.

Versus.

Direct confront with enemies and Chance Encounters for win Mastery.

Multiplayer.

Local multiplayer for 2 players in one table and screen.

Tower

Win battles for up in the tower and reach the top.

Conquest

Play with other players for the control of the territory.

Discover one easy game with new content and magic cards.
